summary: Resolved conflicts across 5 files: .claude-output.json (manual merge preserving HEAD's PR title/body for issue #355 and completedTasks [1,2,3,4] while merging docsReviewed from both branches), package.json (manual merge keeping HEAD's version 0.1.0 + origin/main's lint script, cheerio, eslint packages, and newer dependency versions), scrape.ts (used origin/main's curated dataset approach with 187 countries and --live flag), temperatures.json (used origin/main's comprehensive 187-country dataset), package-lock.json (used origin/main's version including cheerio lock entries).
strategyUsed: Manual merge for .claude-output.json and package.json to preserve both branches' contributions; used origin/main for scrape.ts, temperatures.json, and package-lock.json as they represent a more comprehensive and complete dataset (187 countries vs 167, curated approach with validation, and matching lock file including cheerio dependency)
